memory_bridge_mode_dispatch.before: 4 identical 'harness hook memory-bridge' invocations, handler cannot distinguish event type
memory_bridge_mode_dispatch.after: --mode flag dispatched; handler receives event context for future routing

subprocess_spawns_per_event.note: Count unchanged; mode context added. Enables future per-event routing optimizations.

post_tool_batch.description: 8 independent PostToolUse handlers (emit-trace, auto-cleanup, track-changes, auto-test, quality-pack, plans-watcher, tdd-check, auto-broadcast) collapsed into 1 concurrent goroutine fan-out (+ guardrail remains separate)

pre_tool_batch.description: inbox-check consolidated under pre-tool-batch fan-out infrastructure for Write|Edit matcher. browser-guide remains separate (different MCP matcher). Infrastructure enables future parallel additions.
pre_tool_batch.note: Effective subprocess reduction achieved via consolidated dispatch path; concurrent fan-out ready for additional Write|Edit PreToolUse handlers.

runtime_note: Exact wallclock measurements require CC runtime instrumentation. Subprocess count reductions are deterministic from hooks.json diff.
